title: MUGON-112 Without Words Collection 19 Accidentally Saw A Schoolgirl's Skirt...
overview: Consciously show a sneak peek... A minor's Kozurui trap. A defenseless school girl in a miniskirt who generously shows her legs. Every time I climbed the stairs, the hem spread out like it was jumping, and I could see the white fabric here and there. When I was observing intently to burn it into my mind as a joke, she looked back and smiled as if she could see through everything.
